## Result Summary

The explicit-source harness configured with Visual Studio 18 2026 and built brender_core_float.lib with MSVC 19.50.35721.0 in an external build tree.

## Artifacts Policy

The materialized harness, configure tree, build tree, compiler transcripts, and brender_core_float.lib were kept outside this metadata repo. No generated binaries, copied source, private assets, or restricted SDK material are committed.

## Public Notes

This attempt verifies that explicit period OBJS_C source selection removes the prior source-glob blocker and produces the FLOAT core static library. It does not claim runtime execution, warning cleanup, packaging, drivers, or FIXED variants.

## Blockers

- MSVC x64 build emits pointer-truncation, enum-conversion, const-qualifier, and duplicate-symbol warnings that need portability audit
- no runtime or link smoke test is claimed
- drivers and deferred FIXED variants are not built yet

## Next Actions

- audit and classify the x64 MSVC warning transcript
- add a minimal link or runtime smoke test around the produced core library
- translate deferred FIXED variants and driver targets
- keep generated binaries out of git unless an intentional release package is reviewed
